title: pelargonium elandsmontanum
intro: Pelargonium elandsmontanum, also known as the Elands River Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in South Africa, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium elandsmontanum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as coughs and colds, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium elandsmontanum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
